% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for butte_st_pierre_same_state_negative
% SZS output start Proof for butte_st_pierre_same_state_negative
5. ~same_state(butte,st_pierre) [input(axiom)]
10. ~same_state(butte,st_pierre) [input(conjecture)]
11. ~~same_state(butte,st_pierre) [negated conjecture 10]
12. same_state(butte,st_pierre) [flattening 11]
28. ~same_state(butte,st_pierre) [cnf transformation 5]
47. same_state(butte,st_pierre) [cnf transformation 12]
48. $false [forward subsumption resolution 28,47]
% SZS output end Proof for butte_st_pierre_same_state_negative
